title: Economic Data A Good Days Harvest
section_path: Economic Data A Good Days Harvest
section_path_text: Economic Data A Good Days Harvest
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
Thursday saw some encouraging data releases, which indicate that there is hope for the global economy. First out was the Eurozone economic sentiment indicator, which increased to 93.4 from 91.5 in January and exceeded economists' expectations. The improving sentiment was powered by rising confidence across manufacturing, services and consumers, which pushed the reading to an eleven-month high.
